query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph depicting elongated vertical shadows cast across a textured flat surface, radiating downward from a bright, curved overhead light structure that forms a V-shape at the top of the frame against a dark background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white abstract photograph rendered with heavy analog film grain and soft focus blur, depicting elongated vertical shadows cast across a textured surface from a blurred, glowing overhead light structure that forms a V-shape, abandoning recognizable subject matter in favor of stark tonal contrasts and formal geometric patterns.
